basic_details.job_title: J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 01 vacancies across Jammu. Candidates with any Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-05-2026, and closes on 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through J&K Bank official website jkb.bank.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer - CVO Recruitment 2026.
